pids.name: lateral_accel
pids.display_name: HS-CAN 0x180: Lateral acceleration. Bits 16-25 (data[2] bits 0-1 + data[3]). Formula: ((data[2] & 0x3) << 8 | data[3]) * 0.00390625 - 2. Invalid if data[2]&0x3==0x3 && data[3]==0xFF
pids.notes: HS-CAN: HS-CAN 0x180: Lateral acceleration. Bits 16-25 (data[2] bits 0-1 + data[3]). Formula: ((data[2] & 0x3) << 8 | data[3]) * 0.00390625 - 2. Invalid if data[2]&0x3==0x3 && data[3]==0xFF

pids.name: longitudinal_accel

pids.notes: HS-CAN: HS-CAN 0x160: Longitudinal acceleration. Bits 48-57 (data[6] bits 0-1 + data[7]). Formula: ((data[6] & 0x3) << 8 | data[7]) * 0.00390625 - 2. Invalid if data[6]&0x3==0x3 && data[7]==0xFF

pids.notes: MS-CAN: MS-CAN: Power mode from BCM at 0x080. Byte 2, bits 0-3 (lower 4 bits, little-endian bit 16-19): 0=sleep, 2=awake, 3=just off, 6=ignition, 7=running

pids.notes: MS-CAN: MS-CAN: placeholder for TPMS signal (ID and bit positions TBD)

pids.name: aat_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: Ambient Air Temperature sensor raw voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0x03BA. Captured value: 0x0146=326 counts = 326/204.6 = 1.59V. Convert voltage to temperature via sensor calibration curve.

pids.name: ac_pressure
pids.notes: AC compressor pressure in kPa (canonical). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: 0x015F=351 counts × 2.0 = 702 kPa (~101.8 PSI).

pids.name: ac_pressure_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: AC compressor pressure sensor raw voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0x9800 (1/1024).

pids.name: accel_pedal_position
pids.notes: Uses defineByIdentifier (0x2C 0x01) not defineByMemoryAddress. Raw 0-200 scale, divide by 2 for percentage. Captured values: idle=0%, blip peak=32% in test.

pids.name: accel_pedal_position_sens1_voltage
pids.notes: Accelerator pedal position sensor 1 raw voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: min 0x031F=799 counts=0.78V (0%), max 0x107F=4223 counts=4.12V (100%).

pids.name: baro_pressure
pids.notes: Barometric pressure in kPa (canonical). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: 0x018D=397 counts × 0.25 = 99.25 kPa (~14.4 PSI at sea level).

pids.name: baro_pressure_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: Barometric pressure sensor raw voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: 0x0322=802 counts × 0.004887586 = 3.92V.

pids.name: battery_voltage
pids.notes: Battery voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: 0x7733=30515 counts × 0.00048828125 = 14.90V.

pids.name: etc_angle_actual
pids.notes: Electronic Throttle Control angle actual. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0x093C (1/512). Captured: 1.71° matched AP.

pids.name: etc_angle_desired
pids.notes: Electronic Throttle Control angle desired. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0x091A (1/512). Captured: 1.70-1.71° within AP range of 1.64-1.80°.

pids.name: fuel_rail_pressure_desired
pids.notes: Fuel Rail Pressure desired/target in kPa (canonical). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured raw value 175, × 10 = 1750 kPa (~254 PSI).

pids.name: iat_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: Intake Air Temperature sensor raw voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0x1279 (1/204.6). Captured: raw 384-385 = 1.877-1.882V, AP showed 1.88V - exact match.

pids.name: lowside_fuel_pressure_actual
pids.notes: Lowside (low-pressure) fuel pump pressure in kPa (canonical). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: 567-727 kPa (~82-105 PSI).

pids.name: lpfp_duty_cycle
pids.notes: Low-pressure fuel pump duty cycle. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Scale /163.84. Captured: 61.0-62.7%, AP showed 61.0-62.8%.

pids.name: lpfp_pressure_desired
pids.notes: Low-pressure fuel pump target pressure in kPa (canonical). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL. Captured: ~648 kPa (~94 PSI).

pids.name: lpfp_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: LPFP Sensor Voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Scale 0.001. Captured: 2.360V - 3.090V at idle.

pids.name: map_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: MAP Sensor Voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Scale /1024. Captured: 0.35V-3.88V (vacuum through 35 PSI boost).

pids.name: oar
pids.notes: Octane Adjustment Ratio (learned). Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Signed INT16 / 16384. Captured: -1.00 constant.

pids.name: oil_life_left
pids.notes: Oil Life Remaining. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw value is directly in percent. Captured: 35%.

pids.name: tip_actual_abs
pids.notes: Throttle Inlet Pressure Actual Absolute. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw /128 = kPa. Captured: ~98.9 kPa (14.01 PSI).

pids.name: tip_desired_abs
pids.notes: Throttle Inlet Pressure Desired Absolute. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw /128 = kPa. Captured: 98.52 kPa (14.29 PSI).

pids.name: tip_sensor_voltage
pids.notes: Throttle Inlet Pressure Sensor Voltage. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Scale = 5/1024. Captured: 1.56V (static).

pids.name: vcte_angle_actual
pids.notes: VCT Exhaust Angle Actual. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw /16 = degrees. Captured: 1.1 - 1.9 deg.

pids.name: vcti_angle_actual
pids.notes: VCT Intake Angle Actual. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw /16 = degrees. Captured: -0.2 - 0.4 deg.

pids.name: wgdc_actual
pids.notes: Wastegate Duty Cycle Actual. Uses defineByIdentifier (DID) - UNIVERSAL across all strategies. Raw /327.68 = percent. Captured: idle=0%, blip peak=4.50%.

pids.name: afr_actual
pids.notes: AFR Actual via Lambda. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (165ST-49S). PCM outputs Lambda (1.0=stoich), multiply by 14.7 for AFR. Verified 2026-02-23: ~1.009 Lambda at idle.

pids.name: afr_actual
pids.notes: AFR Actual via Lambda. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). PCM outputs Lambda (1.0=stoich), multiply by 14.7 for AFR. Captured: 1.0 Lambda = 14.7 AFR (engine off/stoich).

pids.name: afr_actual
pids.notes: AFR Actual via Lambda. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (1718RS-R134A). PCM outputs Lambda (1.0=stoich), multiply by 14.7 for AFR. Verified 2026-02-24: Lambda 0.997 / AFR 14.66 at idle.

pids.name: air_density_correction
pids.notes: Air Density Correction factor. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (165ST-49S). Verified 2026-02-23: ~1.046 at idle.

pids.name: air_density_correction
pids.notes: Air Density Correction factor. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). AP showed 1.012-1.013 but captured 0.0 (KOEO?) - needs verification with engine running.

pids.name: airflow_mass
pids.notes: PCM outputs speed-density modeled airflow in lb/min. Verified 2026-02-23: ~0.557 lb/min at idle.

pids.name: airflow_mass
pids.notes: PCM outputs speed-density modeled airflow in lb/min. Confirmed via AP imperial display matching raw float exactly. Idle ~0.41-0.45 lb/min.

pids.name: airflow_mass
pids.notes: PCM outputs speed-density modeled airflow in lb/min. Verified 2026-02-24 (1718RS-R134A): 0.54 lb/min at idle.

pids.name: airflow_mass_desired
pids.notes: Desired/target airflow from ECU. Verified 2026-02-23: ~0.533 lb/min at idle.

pids.name: airflow_mass_desired
pids.notes: Desired/target airflow from ECU. At steady idle, Desired (~0.40-0.41) tracks closely with Actual (~0.39). Difference indicates throttle response lag or transient.

pids.name: airflow_mass_desired
pids.notes: Desired/target airflow from ECU. Verified 2026-02-24 (1718RS-R134A): ~0.52 lb/min at idle.

pids.name: ambient_air_temp
pids.notes: Ambient Air Temperature. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw value is °F. Captured: 47.58°F.

pids.name: boost_pressure
pids.notes: GAUGE PRESSURE - raw value from PCM is inHg, converted to kPa (canonical) at decode. Verified 2026-02-23: ~-18.1 inHg at idle.

pids.name: boost_pressure
pids.notes: GAUGE PRESSURE - raw value from PCM is inHg, converted to kPa (canonical) at decode. Uses defineByMemoryAddress (DMR) - ADDRESS IS STRATEGY-SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Negative at idle/vacuum, positive under boost. Captured at idle: -20 inHg = -67.7 kPa = ~-9.8 PSI.

pids.name: calculated_load
pids.notes: Calculated engine load. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (165ST-49S). Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0xF443 and Mode 01 PID 0x04. Verified 2026-02-23: 0x46=70 counts × 100/255 = 27.5% at idle.

pids.name: calculated_load
pids.notes: Calculated engine load. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Same scale as Mode 22 PID 0xF443 and Mode 01 PID 0x04. Captured: 0x4A=74 counts × 100/255 = 29.02% at idle.

pids.name: catalyst_temp
pids.notes: [REF UNVERIFIED] Catalyst (CAT) temperature. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). IEEE float in °F but values don't match AP display (captured 893°F when AP showed 823°F). May have scaling/offset difference. Low priority - temps don't need FRS rate.

pids.name: compressor_inlet_temp
pids.notes: Compressor inlet (turbo inlet) temperature. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw value is °F. Captured: 97.48°F matched AP's 97.5°F.

pids.name: compressor_outlet_temp
pids.notes: Compressor outlet (charge air before intercooler) temperature. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw value is °F. Captured: 166.88°F matched AP.

pids.name: engine_rpm
pids.notes: RPM is already broadcast on standard CAN at sufficient rate. Documented here for reference only - AP uses this for auto-on/off detection. DO NOT implement as FRS PID. Verified 2026-02-23: ~891 RPM at idle.

pids.name: engine_rpm
pids.notes: RPM is already broadcast on standard CAN at sufficient rate. Documented here for reference only - AP uses this for auto-on/off detection. DO NOT implement as FRS PID.

pids.name: engine_rpm
pids.notes: RPM is already broadcast on standard CAN at sufficient rate. Documented here for reference only - AP uses this for auto-on/off detection. DO NOT implement as FRS PID. Verified 2026-02-24 (1718RS-R134A): ~852 RPM at idle.

pids.name: fuel_level_input
pids.notes: Fuel Level Input. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Same scale as Mode 22 PID F42F (0.392157 = 100/255). Captured: raw 190.94-192.88 = 74.88-75.64%, within AP range 72.8-76.0%.

pids.name: fuel_mass_injected_cyl1
pids.notes: Per-cylinder fuel mass injected. DMR - strategy-specific address. Raw value is uLBMF (micro-pound mass fuel). Captured: 12.35 to 43.80 uLBMF at idle/blip.

pids.name: fuel_rail_pressure_actual
pids.notes: Fuel Rail Pressure actual in kPa (canonical). DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Scale = 6.89476/3.6 = 1.9152. Captured: ~1695-1757 kPa (~246-255 PSI).

pids.name: fuel_rail_temp
pids.notes: Fuel Rail Temperature. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float is directly °F. Captured: 129.31-129.39°F - exact match to AP display.

pids.name: ign_corr_cyl1
pids.notes: Ignition Correction Cylinder 1. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (165ST-49S). Verified 2026-02-23: 0.0° at idle.

pids.name: ign_corr_cyl1
pids.notes: Ignition Correction Cylinder 1. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float likely in degrees. Address captured, scale needs verification while driving. Mode 22 PID 03EC uses -1/512 scale for UINT16.

pids.name: ign_timing_cyl1
pids.notes: Ignition Timing Cylinder 1. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float directly in degrees. Captured: 5.70° - 28.17° - matches AP display.

pids.notes: Ignition Timing Cylinder 1. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (1718RS-R134A). Verified 2026-02-24: ~5.7 deg at idle.

pids.name: ign_timing_cyl2
pids.notes: Ignition Timing Cylinder 2. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float directly in degrees. Captured: 6.72° - 12.84° - matches AP display.

pids.notes: Ignition Timing Cylinder 2. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (1718RS-R134A). Verified 2026-02-24: ~3.6 deg at idle.

pids.notes: Ignition Timing Cylinder 3. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (1718RS-R134A). Verified 2026-02-24: ~3-4 deg at idle.

pids.name: inj_pulse_width_cyl1
pids.notes: Injector Pulse Width Cylinder 1. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float in microseconds, divide by 1000 for ms. Captured: 1368-1498 µs = 1.368-1.498 ms - matches AP display.

pids.name: inj_pulse_width_cyl2
pids.notes: Injector Pulse Width Cylinder 2. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float in microseconds, divide by 1000 for ms. Captured: 1445-1545 µs = 1.445-1.545 ms.

pids.name: inj_pulse_width_cyl3
pids.notes: Injector Pulse Width Cylinder 3. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float in microseconds, divide by 1000 for ms. Captured: 1380-1524 µs = 1.380-1.524 ms.

pids.name: inj_pulse_width_cyl4
pids.notes: Injector Pulse Width Cylinder 4. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float in microseconds, divide by 1000 for ms. Captured: 1417-1654 µs = 1.417-1.654 ms.

pids.name: lambda_raw
pids.notes: Lambda (Raw) from wideband O2 sensor. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw value is lambda ratio (1.0 = stoich). Captured: 0.98-1.00 lambda at idle.

pids.name: load_actual
pids.notes: [REF UNVERIFIED] Load Actual. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw float captured: 43.5-50.2, AP showed 0.153-0.205%. Scale unclear - possibly raw/256 but doesn't match exactly.

pids.name: longitudinal_accel
pids.notes: Longitudinal Acceleration from vehicle accelerometer. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw value is m/s². Captured: -0.085 to -0.015 m/s² at idle (parked).

pids.name: lpfp_input_voltage
pids.notes: LPFP Input Voltage. DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw IEEE float directly in volts. Captured: 8.943V - 9.176V at idle.

pids.name: ltft
pids.notes: Long Term Fuel Trim in % (canonical). DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Scale=100/128, offset=-100. Captured: 16.41% at idle.

pids.name: map
pids.notes: Manifold Absolute Pressure in kPa (canonical). DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Scale = 0.49 × 6.89476 = 3.378. Captured: ~30 kPa at idle (~4.3 PSI), ~98 kPa at atmospheric (~14.2 PSI).

pids.name: misfire_count
pids.notes: [REF UNVERIFIED] NEEDS RE-CAPTURE: Original address D0009F30 was WRONG (that's RPM). Captured value of 1 was actually part of RPM float. Need to find correct memory address for misfire count.

pids.name: oil_temp
pids.notes: Oil Temperature in °C (canonical). DMR - STRATEGY SPECIFIC (Cobb 49S). Raw is °F, converted to °C at decode. Captured: 151.8°F = 66.6°C.

pids.name: stft

pids.name: stft

pids.name: stft_hires
